🤖 AI Config

Desktop OCR uses the local proxy and the config saved in SQLite. This is the bit that went missing.

My Characters

0/10 characters

No characters added yet. Add one above.

Character names max 10 characters; up to 20 characters. Changes reflect immediately in the tracker.

Desktop data is stored in SQLite. Save/Load Config is for import/export, not the main storage layer.

📷 Screenshot Behavior

Quick Add — skip review, add directly
Auto-create missing deviations, variants & traits

Quick Add: OCR results go straight to tracker (no review). Auto-create: new items are added to your lists automatically.

Confirm

Are you sure?

Contribute Config (PR)

Upload your exported <name>-config.json. Maintainers validate and merge it into config.js defaults.

Upload to GitHub (Create PR)

1) Add file → Upload files
2) Upload <name>-config.json into contrib/configs/
3) Commit changes
4) Open PR with base branch dev

📷 Add Deviation from Screenshot

📸
Drop screenshot here, paste (Ctrl+V), or click to browse
Supports PNG, JPG, WebP. Max ~10MB. Select multiple files for batch.
✕ Remove
Analyzing screenshot...

⚡ Once Human — Deviation Tracker Setup

Do you want to use the Screenshot OCR feature?

The screenshot feature uses AI to extract deviation data from game screenshots automatically.

Without it, you can still manually add deviations using the Add Deviation button.

Local LLM or Cloud?

🔧 Local LLM

  • Free, private, works offline
  • Needs ~4-8GB disk + GPU/RAM
  • Runs on your machine
  • Uses Ollama (auto-install if needed)

☁️ Cloud (OpenRouter)

  • No install, fast, ~$0.001/use
  • Requires account at openrouter.ai
  • Minimum $10 credit deposit
  • Recommended: gpt-4o-mini

Detecting local LLM providers...

Scanning...

Choose a vision model

All models fit within 8GB VRAM:

☁️ Cloud LLM Setup

What this requires:
1. Sign up at openrouter.ai
2. Add a minimum of $10 credit (one-time, lasts months of use)
3. Create an API key at openrouter.ai/keys
4. Paste the key below

Recommended model: openai/gpt-4o-mini
Cost: ~$0.001 per screenshot (1000 screenshots ≈ $1)
